case_title: WALLY WALIZADA VS. MARIO BENJAMIN LOPEZ SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY WALIZADA, WALLY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, MARIO BENJAMIN LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY WALIZADA, WALLY SANCHEZ, MARIO BENJAMIN LOPEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALIZADA, WALLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, MARIO BENJAMIN LOPEZ $1,225.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, PLAINTIFF'S DRIVER WAS 50% NEGLIGENT FOR DRIVING PARTIALLY IN A BIKE LANE AT TIME OF ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALIZADA, WALLY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
